overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (Oblivion) showing a player walking through the Imperial City at night, entering the Arboretum, and observing a large moon and classical statues. The scene features detailed stone Gothic architecture, cobblestone streets, and transitions from enclosed urban streets to an open monument garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street between tall stone buildings with Gothic architecture

events.description: NPC pedestrian walks past the player on the cobblestone street
approaching the large wooden door entrance to the Imperial City Arboretum

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the city streets at night, navigating between tall stone buildings lit by warm lanterns

notable_agents.action: walking along the street toward and past the player, wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: tall stone building with arched windows emitting warm orange light
tall stone building with columns and decorative Gothic stonework
ornate wall-mounted lanterns casting warm light on the cobblestones
large wooden door with metal studs and an arched stone frame

segments.scene_description: The player walks through narrow cobblestone streets of a medieval city at night, flanked by tall stone buildings with Gothic architecture and warm lantern light. An NPC pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction. The segment ends as the player approaches the wooden door leading to the Arboretum.

scene_state.functional_zone: monument garden with classical statues and domed rotunda under open sky

events.description: opening the wooden door and transitioning into the Imperial City Arboretum
camera tilts upward to observe the large moon and starry night sky

agents.ego_description: entering the Arboretum, looking up at the large moon in the night sky, then walking toward the statues and monuments

entered.detail: circular classical building with columns and a domed roof at the garden's center
massive reddish planet-like moon visible in the starry night sky
tall classical statues of robed figures standing on stone pedestals
dark silhouettes of mature trees framing the garden path
tall ornate building with pointed spires visible behind the rotunda

segments.scene_description: The player enters the open Arboretum garden, transitioning from enclosed streets to a wide space with a domed rotunda and classical statues. The camera tilts up to reveal a massive moon in the starry sky before continuing forward past robed figure statues toward a Gothic spire building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the enclosed, lantern-lit streets of a medieval city into the expansive openness of a moonlit monument garden. It begins by navigating narrow cobblestone paths flanked by tall Gothic stone buildings, passing a lone pedestrian under the warm glow of street lamps. As the camera approaches and passes through a wooden door, the oppressive urban walls give way to the wide, airy space of the Arboretum. The scene then opens up to reveal a domed rotunda and classical robed statues, with the camera tilting upward to capture a massive moon hanging in a starry sky. Finally, the view settles back forward, gliding past the stone figures toward a distant Gothic spire.
